nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Welcome, welcome! Best wares in all of Ashenvale! What catches your eye today?

choices.text: What do you have for sale?

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Ah, interested are we? I've got healing salves, mysterious maps, and the finest travel supplies. Of course, everything has its price...

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Name's Garrick. Been trading these roads for twenty years. Seen a lot, heard more. If you ever need to know something... well, information is a commodity too, you know.

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Take your time, take your time. But remember, the best deals don't last forever!

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Information, eh? Well, I've heard whispers about the Shadow Grove. Strange lights at night, eerie sounds. Some say it's cursed. Others say there's treasure to be found there.

choices.text: Interesting. Tell me more about the Shadow Grove.

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: The Shadow Grove lies to the east, past the old mill. Used to be a sacred place, but now? Now it's home to things that shouldn't exist. If you're planning to go there, you'll need more than luck.
